raw_text: It's a great app, I've been using it for long time and i haven't faced any problem, the delivery is incredibly fast, most orders arrive within 10 minutes, today i order something and get it in just 7 minutes. Also the customer care is very good , few days ago I got damaged product then i call them they respond very well and sends me a fresh new product in few minutes, my overall experience is so good

Blinkit is a terrible app. Every time I’ve placed an order, it has never arrived complete; items go missing along the way. I have to file a complaint every time, and resolving it takes a long time. The main issue is that the goods don't reach us safely or properly, so what is the point of ordering? It’s an app that has no customer care number—or rather, a number where no one ever answers the phone; you can only send emails. You tell me, what are we supposed to do?

Worst app and one of the worst customer support experiences I've ever had. I was sent the wrong product, even though the app clearly did not mention that I would receive a different item. I spent over two hours trying to reach customer support, only to get inconsistent responses. One representative even claimed they couldn't contact the store. Later, I received a call from Blinkit assuring me that I would get a refund. However, they didn't refund

Ordered a product of zebronics from blinkit the product didn't connected to my PC and was not working in brand new condition and this was cash on delivery. When I asked for refund they said they'll refund as a coupon in blinkit only not in my source account or the account details I'll provide for refund. That's totally wrong from customer's point of view. And now the same product is out of stock.

i have been a regular customer, virtually ordering everything I need from daily essentials to even gadgets from Blinkit, I recently made a purchase, the product was pathetic. they knew that and after my purchase reduced the price by mre than fifty percent, this has happened a few times earlier which I did not heed to, assuming it was a coincidence. please don't take customers for a ride, the application depends on us and no the other way around.

I am writing to raise a complaint regarding the condition of my recent order delivery. Although my order was delivered on time, I noticed that the carry bag/packaging used by the delivery partner was torn when it reached me. This is not the first time this has happened. I have experienced the same issue on at least two to three previous orders as well. While the products inside were delivered, receiving orders in torn packaging is concerning and creates doubts about proper handling during transi

Delivered product with half the amount as shown in product details, when inquired they are saying that there may be some discrepancy in image shown and delivered items. Final update : got compensated for the half after nearly 48hr

⭐ 1 Star Whenever I order groceries from this app, I end up facing the same issue. Either I receive a damaged product or my ordered item is replaced with something I never asked for. The biggest problem is that there is no proper option to return the unwanted replacement or get a fair resolution. Customer support keeps offering promo codes instead of solving the actual problem or providing a proper refund. This has happened multiple times, not just once. As a customer, I expect to receive the

I had ordered a raincoat set, but upon receiving the delivery, I found that only the rain pant was included in the package. The raincoat jacket, which is an essential part of the product, was completely missing from the order. This is extremely disappointing, as I paid for the complete product but received only a partial item.

For the past month or two, OTPs are not being received. I try to login and I don't get that message. Yes, I already checked that the number that sends the OTPs isn't blocked. I have to login through Zomato and that's really off putting. I have even started to not use Zomato out of annoyance. Please fix this bug already.

Received a damaged product not once, but twice. What is even more disappointing is that there is no proper option in the app to raise a complaint or get timely support. Customers are forced to send emails and then wait endlessly for a response, with no clear resolution process. This is by far one of the worst customer service experience.

most of the time so many items r out of stock. and then there r times when all the items ordered are not delivered but payment is collected in full. then one has to go through the trouble of raising a complaint. if an item suddenly goes out of stock after placing the order why can't the store call or send a notification for the same informing the customer in advance

The app is overall good but the problems I have been recently facing is that the order shows it will be delivered in suppose 10 mins, but then it takes so longer and sometimes it reaches 25 mins and still the order isn't picked up by any delivery partner. We have trusted Blinkit with our orders but this experience has disappointed me alot more than I expected. I hope you look over this matter blinkit.

very buggy app, unable to use the app always says nothing here.. and some listing disappear just like that.. and sometimes it shows error messages and other times it says VPN is active! if you keep this up....buddy Amanzon Now is giving me cashback that you never gave since your inception, I am a long time user since grofer days! if you block my access and not let me shop at your platform I can just as easily shift to Amazon Now!! just tried placing order now but had to order from Amazon NOW!!

ordered a Portronics Power Plate 17 Extension Board because it was advertised with a 16A socket. However, the 16A socket is smaller than the standard size, so my 16A plug doesn't fit properly. When I requested a return, Blinkit rejected it saying the product wasn't damaged. My issue is not about damage—it's that the product doesn't work as advertised for a standard 16A plug. Very disappointing customer support. Please improve your return policy and resolve genuine customer issues.

the experience is mostly good but the slightly delays sometime makes me go wild!! I don't like this thing, like some things are very necessary and this app just delays things....u should put some more efforts although I would like to rate the app a solid 3.7 out of 5....!and really appreciate the hardwork of the delivery partners, but also sometimes the blinkit group gives me the dusty objects and dead flowers which obv makes me disappointed but although it's a good app and v recommendable....!

Actually Extraordinary it's an app that when we are not able to buy things immediately this app works actually fantastic it's really good. Actually In today’s fast-paced world, convenience is no longer a luxury; it is an absolute necessity. Among the countless service apps cluttering our smartphones, Blinkit stands out as an absolute game-changer.it has to completely transformed the way I manage my household, handle emergencies, and satisfy late-night cravings. Calling it an e-grocery app feels.

Best delivery app ever. Whenever I order something, it quickly assigns a delivery partner within 2 minutes and the delivery is also super fast. It's very recommended to use if you are in a hurry to go somewhere and you need something urgent. The prices are also reasonable and i LOVE the imported items that they have like Cheetos, Nerds, Korean Buldak noodles, Little cute cookies from Thailand, etc. I always recommend this app for faster delivery service. The products also come in good condition.

I have ordered Portronics wireless keyboard and mouse from Blinkit. I have received only the wireless keyboard and the wireless mouse was missing. The keyboard was also not working. The cover of the keyboard is dirty and damaged. I have talked to the Blinkit customer service expert, her name was Diya and have asked to eitherprovide the missing mouse or refund the amount. Diya has directly told me that she cannot do anything either of the above in this regard as this is not as Blinkit policy.

the quality of things are not so good if they are sealed with clear plastic then it's fine but if it's open like paperback books the sides of the books are too dirty and the covers are also very much damaged.I reqest BLINKIT to fix this problem. Thank you so much Blinkit for fixing this problem.
